title: Budgets, Interest, Loans, and Financial Decisions · Model Lens: Simple Interest
summary: Compare household plans, emergency savings, credit costs, and loan offers without hiding assumptions. Planned artifact: Add and verify the math beg simple interest increment in an explainable household decision model. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Calculate simple interest and distinguish principal, rate, and time units.
Classify fixed, variable, periodic, and discretionary cash flows in a time-aligned budget.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-beginner cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper

steps.why: The Simple Interest result for an explainable household decision model is incomplete until its unit, assumptions, scale, and tolerance survive a reasonableness check.
